message:
fix(core): fresh-eyes corrections to prior audit fixes

cuckoo_filter.rs:
- Revert incorrect duplicate detection that false-positived on
  fingerprint collisions between different items. Cuckoo filters
  store fingerprints not keys, so duplicate detection is inherently
  unreliable. Document this limitation in the method doc comment.

caut.rs:
- Fix off-by-one in ellipsis boundary: use < instead of <= so
  max_len == ellipsis.len() (3) produces "..." rather than
  raw truncation without the ellipsis indicator.

xor_filter.rs:
- Use checked_mul(3) instead of bare multiplication in the
  deserialization guard to prevent overflow on corrupted
  block_length values. Both XorFilter8 and XorFilter16.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
